reqSnippet: The system SHALL provide a standardized discovery model to capture application RBAC readiness inputs
The system SHALL require completion of minimum discovery criteria before entitlement mapping
The system SHALL require identification of business and technical owners
The system SHALL require documented role constructs or confirmation none exist
The system SHALL require a current permission inventory
The system SHALL identify privileged access paths during discovery
The system SHALL capture segregation-of-duties considerations
The system SHALL track discovery lifecycle status
The system SHALL retain discovery artifacts as audit evidence
The system SHALL support RBAC governance for non-human identities
The system SHALL support explicit definition of business roles
The system SHALL enforce role eligibility criteria
The system SHALL require documented role purpose and owner
The system SHALL support role lifecycle states
The system SHALL ensure users inherit access only through roles
The system SHALL automatically revoke access when role removed
The system SHALL support role composition
The system SHALL support periodic role review
The system SHALL require approval and justification for material role changes
The system SHALL enforce role-to-permission mapping
The system SHALL require justification for permissions in roles
The system SHALL flag privileged entitlements during mapping
The system SHALL require role owner approval for permission changes
The system SHALL apply privileged designation using governance criteria
The system SHALL support role-based access requests
The system SHALL route approvals based on governance rules
The system SHALL record approval decisions as evidence
The system SHALL prevent fulfillment without approvals
The system SHALL support time-bound / JIT role activation
Automatically revoke JIT access
The system SHALL record JIT events as audit evidence
The system SHALL support periodic access certifications
The system SHALL assign certifiers by governance rules
The system SHALL record certification decisions
The system SHALL trigger actions from certification outcomes
The system SHALL set certification cadence by risk tier
The system SHALL support documented access exceptions
The system SHALL enforce expiration or revalidation of exceptions
The system SHALL support emergency (break glass) access with review
The system SHALL retain exception and emergency evidence
The system SHALL trigger role review from repeated exceptions
The system SHALL report who has access and why
The system SHALL retain historical access records
The system SHALL support on-demand audit evidence
The system SHALL ensure evidence is complete and attributable
RBAC depends on IGA for execution
IGA is system of record for roles and assignments
IGA executes provisioning, certification, JIT
IGA retains audit evidence for all access events

outcome: RBAC roles executable across all environments
reqSnippet: The system SHALL support hybrid identity environments spanning on-premises and SaaS
The system SHALL support coexistence of on-premises and SaaS components with equivalent capability
The system SHALL support phased migration and parallel operation with legacy IAM systems
The system SHALL support governance of connected and non-connected applications
The system SHALL include non-connected applications in access reviews and certifications
The system SHALL support standard enterprise integration patterns (APIs, directories, DBs, files, SCIM)
The system SHALL provide prebuilt connectors for common enterprise and SaaS systems
The system SHALL provide extensibility mechanisms where direct connectors do not exist
The system SHALL provide comprehensive audit logging for identity, access, and governance actions
The system SHALL capture approver identity, timestamps, and before/after access state
The system SHALL support configurable audit log retention policies
The system SHALL detect and report governed directory and group membership changes
The system SHALL detect access granted outside IGA-governed workflows
The system SHALL retain reconciliation actions and outcomes as audit evidence

The system SHALL retain certification decisions with reviewer, outcome, and timestamp
The system SHALL support role-level certifications
